positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a central grouping of oversized, luminous glowing mushrooms, interconnected roots, and firefly-like specks of light. The style should be modern kawaii fantasy, using crisp vector lines and flat areas of saturated color with subtle gradient glows. Composition must be highly symmetric and centered, framed by silhouetted, stylized trees and ferns. Use a restricted color palette dominated by deep sapphire blue, luminous teal, rich emerald green, and accents of warm gold and magenta. The print must have clean edges and high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Isolated on a clean, neutral background for easy graphic placement. Minimalist yet magical.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, monochrome, poorly drawn hands, weird anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, copyright, trademark
